title: arnica louiseana subsp. genuina
intro: Arnica louiseana subsp. genuina is a subspecies of the Arnica louiseana plant, a perennial herb native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which make it a popular remedy for pain relief and wound healing. The health benefits of Arnica louiseana subsp. genuina include reduced inflammation and pain, improved wound healing, and enhanced skin health. Herbal preparations of Arnica louiseana subsp. genuina include topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as tinctures and infusions, which can be used to soothe sore muscles and joints, reduce bruising, and promote overall well-being.
